# Project Guidelines

## Current Workspace State
- This repository currently contains a product requirements document at `PRD Full Stack Training.pdf` and no source code.
- Treat the PRD as the primary source of requirements until implementation files are added.

## Build and Test
- No build or test commands are defined yet.
- After source code is added, detect the project stack from manifest/config files and use the standard commands for that stack.
- Prefer running targeted checks first, then full project checks before finalizing changes.

## Conventions
- Keep generated scaffolding minimal and aligned to requirements in `PRD Full Stack Training.pdf`.
- Avoid introducing framework-specific structure until the stack is explicit in the repository.
- When adding implementation, include a short README section or docs link for setup and verification commands.

## Documentation
- Link to existing docs rather than duplicating them.
- If new architecture or process docs are added, reference them from here instead of copying details.
